name: Venous Thromboembolism - D-dimer Lab Query (Elevated)
description: Tests ability to find VTE patients via elevated D-dimer. D-dimer is a fibrin degradation product elevated in active thrombosis. The clinical cutoff for VTE workup is age-adjusted but typically >0.5 mcg/mL FEU (500 ng/mL FEU). The Synthea module generates D-dimer >2.0 mcg/mL FEU for active VTE patients.
prompt: Find patients with elevated D-dimer lab results greater than 0.5 micrograms per milliliter (the clinical cutoff for venous thromboembolism workup).

prompts.broad: Find patients with elevated D-dimer (fibrin degradation product) — values greater than 0.5 mcg/mL FEU (the standard threshold for further VTE workup).
prompts.expert: I need Observation resources with elevated D-dimer. Use LOINC code 48065-7 (Fibrin D-dimer FEU [Mass/volume] in Platelet poor plasma). Filter by value-quantity greater than 0.5 mcg/mL. Query: Observation?code=http://loinc.org|48065-7&value-quantity=gt0.5||ug/mL

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with elevated D-dimer suggesting active thrombosis. D-dimer is sensitive but not specific.

required_codes.display: Fibrin D-dimer FEU [Mass/volume] in Platelet poor plasma
